name: AlphaEval
description: AlphaEval: Evaluating Agents in Production is a production-grounded benchmark of 94 tasks sourced from seven companies deploying AI agents in their core business, spanning six O*NET domains. It evaluates complete agent products as commercial systems, capturing performance variations invisible to model-level evaluation.

metrics.name: overall_score
metrics.calculation: 基于多种评估范式（LLM-as-a-Judge, formal verification, rubric-based assessment 等）的加权

inference_environment.description: 代理（Agents）在 Docker 沙盒环境中通过 CLI 调用进行评测，并记录完整输出轨迹。

test_method: 使用 AlphaEval 框架运行 `run_eval.sh` 脚本针对指定的代理（如 Claude Code, Codex 等）和任务运行评估，包含基于代码执行、LLM 评委、完全匹配、F1 匹配、混合评估和 UI 测试等模板。
notes: AlphaEval 强调真实商业环境和多维度的质量/能力评估，以需求到基准构建框架将生产需求转化为可执行评估任务。
